risk_title: Political and Governance Fragility Affecting Implementation Coordination
risk_summary: Political instability and governance fragility in Somalia continues to constrain inter-governmental coordination mechanisms necessary for project implementation across federal, state, and municipal levels.

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints in Fragile Governance Context
risk_summary: Weak institutional capacity for implementation and sustainability persists across municipal governments in a fragile state context, affecting project delivery and long-term service sustainability.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability [Risk Rating] High [at Approval], Substantial [Last Approved Rating], Substantial [Proposed Rating]

risk_title: Fiduciary Risk in Conflict-Affected Governance Environment
risk_summary: High fiduciary risk persists in implementing project financial management and procurement across multiple municipalities in a fragile governance context with limited institutional oversight capacity.
evidence_quote: Fiduciary [Risk Rating] High [at Approval], High [Last Approved Rating], High [Proposed Rating]

risk_title: Displacement and Refugee Pressures on Urban Infrastructure
risk_summary: Significant displacement pressures from drought and conflict are driving urban migration, with the project responding to forced displacement through dedicated component allocating $65 million to serve IDPs and host communities.
evidence_quote: Response to Urban Forced Displacement:(Cost 65,000,000.00)... Number of beneficiaries benefitting from cash assistance... 50,619 households (approx. 163,054 individuals) have benefitted from multipurpose cash assistance, of which 86% have been female-headed households and 100% have been IDP households.

risk_summary: Drought-induced displacement is creating acute pressure on urban services and livelihoods, requiring emergency response mechanisms and forcing project adaptation to address humanitarian needs alongside infrastructure development.
evidence_quote: CERC activated for drought response in September 2022, including formally approved CERC Ops Manual... Number of beneficiaries reached under the municipal drought response (% women, IDPs) (Number) Total 1,056,397; with 63% women, 82% IDPs

risk_summary: Tensions between federal, state, and municipal government levels are affecting coordination mechanisms, with inter-governmental forums not consistently inclusive of all counterparts.
evidence_quote: Not all forums recorded were inclusive of all FGS/FMS/Municipal counterparts.
